title: panicum bicknellii var. bushii
intro: Panicum bicknellii var. bushii, also known as Bush's Panic Grass or Bush's Witch Grass, is a type of flowering grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Panicum bicknellii var. bushii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
